zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers於大約1145年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布維爾哈度易時，他的父親Vilain de La Villehardouin31歲，母親Dameron de Villehardouin29歲。他於大約1180年與Celine de Briel結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1216年在法國德 艾斯特芒內布藍東維勒斯享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers于大约1145年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布維爾哈度易时，他的父亲Vilain de La Villehardouin31岁，母亲Dameron de Villehardouin29岁。他于大约1180年与Celine de Briel结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1216年在法国德 艾斯特芒內布藍東維勒斯享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers was born about 1145, in Villehardouin, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Vilain de La Villehardouin, was 31 and his mother, Dameron de Villehardouin, was 29. He married Celine de Briel about 1180. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1216, in Brandonvillers, Marne, Grand Est, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers est né environ 1145, à Villehardouin, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Vilain de La Villehardouin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Dameron de Villehardouin, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Celine de Briel environ 1180. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1216, à Brandonvillers, Marne, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers um 1145 in Villehardouin, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Vilain de La Villehardouin 31 und seine Mutter Dameron de Villehardouin 29. Er hat um 1180 Celine de Briel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1216 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Brandonvillers, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers è nato il circa 1145 nel Villehardouin, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Vilain de La Villehardouin, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Dameron de Villehardouin, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Celine de Briel circa 1180. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1216, nel Brandonvillers, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.Brandonvillers, Marne, Champagne, France: フランスグランド エストマルンブランドンヴィラーズ
ja.lifeSummary: Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillersが約1145年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベヴィレハードウインで生まれた時，父Vilain de La Villehardouinは31歳，母Dameron de Villehardouinは29歳であった。約1180年にCeline de Brielと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1216年にフランスグランド エストマルンブランドンヴィラーズで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers(이)가 대략 1145년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 비레하르다인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Vilain de La Villehardouin(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Dameron de Villehardouin(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1180년 Celine de Briel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1216년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 브랜도비레르스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Villehardouin, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Vilain de La Villehardouin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Dameron de Villehardouin, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Celine de Briel aproximadamente 1180. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1216, em Brandonvillers, Marne, Grand Est, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers родился около 1145 г. в местности виллэардоуин, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Vilain de La Villehardouin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Dameron de Villehardouin, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Celine de Briel около 1180 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1216 г. в местности брэндонвиллирс, марн, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean De Villehardouin Seigneur Brandonvillers nació aproximadamente 1145, en Villehardouin, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Vilain de La Villehardouin, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Dameron de Villehardouin, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Celine de Briel aproximadamente 1180. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1216, en Brandonvillers, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
